task.summary: Changing verification to a slash command

Adding debating tag to new debates

MESSAGE.value: Correcing tech map rendering
Correcting tech map rendering
Adding prereq forcing to technology researching
Updating admin commands
Adding trade good updates to turn updating
Defending against loop double running
Adding protection for next running to permit the loop to start
Add turn loop verifying
Add gp table command
Minor formatting fixes in GP table generation
Refactor tax level logic to remove redundant `self.user_info` attribute usage
Adjust national unrest calculation to factor in citizen growth dynamics
Correcting view group creation
Adding market value display command
Update authority gain tracking for more detailed calculations
Adding the tidy system to remove blank relations and correct databases
Adding auth logging amounts to turn calc
Correcting pol auth to use correct unrest calc
Correcting puppet release issue
Responding to accept/deny
Correcting puppet release
Correcting turn updates
Correcting turn updates for puppet auth gain tracking
Correcting military alliance reduction logic error
Add market good production view command
